prompt.name: pattern-copy-play

content.thinking:
This is a comprehensive set of instructions for setting up Storybook in a project. Let me follow the steps carefully:

1. Analyze the codebase
2. Build the default app environment in preview
3. Support portals with preview-body.html
4. Mock side effects globally
5. Write stories
6. Write play functions for every story
7. Prove CSS is loaded
8. Cover the patterns found
9. Verify rendering and types

Let me start by analyzing the codebase structure.

content.text: I'll start by analyzing the codebase thoroughly. Let me explore the project structure, entry points, and key patterns.

input.prompt:
I need a thorough analysis of this React project for Storybook setup. Please explore:

1. Project structure - top-level dirs and key files
2. src/main.tsx - entry point, providers, CSS imports
3. src/App.tsx - app shell, routing, provider tree
4. All providers/contexts used (follow imports deep)
5. All CSS/style imports at the root level
6. All hooks that do data fetching (fetch, axios, react-query, etc.)
7. All browser state reads (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies)
8. All portal usage (createPortal, modal roots, etc.)
9. Key pages/components that would make good story targets
10. Package.json - dependencies, scripts (especially TypeScript check command)
11. Existing .storybook config (main.ts, preview.ts, etc.)
12. Any existing stories
13. Any MSW setup already in place
14. Any date-dependent rendering

Be very thorough - read the actual file contents, not just list them. I need to understand the full runtime environment.

1→import { StrictMode } from 'react'
     2→import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
     3→
     4→import App from './App'
     5→import * as serviceWorker from './serviceWorker'
     6→
     7→const container = document.querySelector('#root') as HTMLElement
     8→const root = createRoot(container)
     9→
    10→root.render(
    11→  <StrictMode>
    12→    <App />
    13→  </StrictMode>
    14→)
    15→
    16→// If you want your app to work offline and load faster, you can change
    17→// unregister() to register() below. Note this comes with some pitfalls.
    18→// Learn more about service workers: https://bit.ly/CRA-PWA
    19→serviceWorker.unregister()

1→import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
     2→import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
     3→import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'
     5→
     6→import { store } from './app-state'
     7→import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
     8→import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
     9→import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'
    10→
    11→export default function App() {
    12→  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
    13→  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <Router>
    17→      <StoreProvider store={store}>
    18→        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
    19→          <GlobalStyle />
    20→          <AppRoutes />
    21→        </ThemeProvider>
    22→      </StoreProvider>
    23→    </Router>
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→

     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'

    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→

    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {

    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)

    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}

content.text:
Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me create a detailed report.

## Comprehensive React Project Analysis for Storybook Setup

### 1. PROJECT STRUCTURE

**Top-level directories:**
- `/src` - Main application source
- `/.storybook` - Storybook configuration
- `/public` - Static assets
- `/node_modules` - Dependencies
- `/.github`, `.husky` - Git config and hooks
- `/functions` - Netlify functions (external)

**Key root files:**
- `package.json` - Configured with Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.17, MSW 2.7.3, React 19.0.0
- `index.html` - Dual render targets: `#root` and `#modal`
- `tsconfig.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `vitest.config.ts` - Build configuration
- `.storybook/main.ts`, `.storybook/preview.tsx` - Storybook config

### 2. ENTRY POINT - `/src/index.tsx`

```
- Creates React root with StrictMode
- No CSS imports at entry (GlobalStyle handled in App)
- Service worker unregistered (PWA disabled)
```

### 3. APP SHELL - `/src/App.tsx`

**Provider Tree (critical for stories):**
```
<Router>                          (react-router-dom)
  <StoreProvider store={store}>   (Redux)
    <ThemeProvider theme={theme}> (styled-components)
      <GlobalStyle />             (Styled-components global styles)
      <AppRoutes />               (routing component)
    </ThemeProvider>
  </StoreProvider>
</Router>
```

**Dark Mode Implementation:**
- Uses `useDarkMode` hook from `use-dark-mode` library
- **CRITICAL**: Reads from localStorage via the hook
- State: `value: boolean` (false = light, true = dark)
- Applied dynamically at root App level

**CSS/Style Imports:**
- GlobalStyle uses styled-components `createGlobalStyle`
- Imports external CSS:
  - `react-multi-carousel/lib/styles.css`
  - `react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css`
- Google Fonts: Montserrat (400, 500, 700, 900) and Hind (400, 500)
- Smooth 250ms transitions on theme switch

### 4. PROVIDERS & CONTEXTS DEEP DIVE

**Redux Store** (`/src/app-state/`)
- **Slices:**
  - `cart`: `{ visible: boolean, items: CartItem[] }`
    - Actions: toggleVisibilityAction, saveItemAction, clearItemAction, removeItemAction, clearCartAction
  - `order`: `{ items: CartItem[] }`
    - Actions: saveOrderAction, clearOrderAction

- **Selectors (cart):**
  - `selectCartVisibility`
  - `selectCartItems`
  - `selectCartTotal`

- **Custom Hooks:**
  - `useAppDispatch()` - Typed dispatch
  - `useAppSelector()` - Typed selector with RootState

**Dark Mode** (`use-dark-mode` package)
- **KEY ISSUE**: Accesses `localStorage` for persistence
- Hook called in: `App.tsx`, `Header.tsx`
- Needs mocking/provider in Storybook

**Routing** (`react-router-dom` v7.2.0)
- `BrowserRouter` at root
- Routes defined in `Routes.tsx`
- Portal element `#modal` created in Routes component for modals

**Styled Components** (`styled-components` v6.1.15)
- Theme provider with light/dark variants
- Comprehensive theme object with color, spacing, typography, borderRadius, boxShadow

### 5. CSS/STYLE IMPORTS AT ROOT LEVEL

**GlobalStyle** (`/src/styles/GlobalStyle.tsx`):
- Resets via `CSSReset` 
- External dependencies:
  - `react-multi-carousel/lib/styles.css`
  - `react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css`
- Custom fonts via `@font-face` (Montserrat, Hind from Google Fonts)
- Responsive breakpoints via `breakpoints.ts`

**Theme System** (`/src/styles/theme.ts`):
- Light and dark theme variants
- Colors, spacing, typography, borderRadius, boxShadow objects
- Dark mode swaps specific color values

### 6. DATA FETCHING HOOKS

**Location:** `/src/api/hooks.ts`

```
useFetchRestaurants()
  - Fetches all restaurants
  - Status: 'idle' | 'loading' | 'success' | statusCode (error)
  
useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId?: string)
  - Fetches restaurants filtered by category
  - Depends on categoryId
  
useFetchRestaurant(id: string)
  - Fetches single restaurant by ID
```

**API Client** (`/src/api/index.ts`):
- Axios-based
- BASE_URL: `https://mealdrop.netlify.app/.netlify/functions/restaurants`
- **Mock Detection**: Checks `import.meta.env.STORYBOOK`, `NODE_ENV === 'test'`, `__vitest_browser__`
- **Caching**: In-memory Map cache (disabled in mocked environments)
- No MSW setup currently configured (package installed but not initialized)

### 7. BROWSER STATE READS

**localStorage:**
- Used via `use-dark-mode` library for theme persistence
- Stores dark mode preference under key controlled by the library
- **No direct localStorage access** in app code

**sessionStorage:**
- Not used

**Cookies:**
- Not used

### 8. PORTAL USAGE

**Single Portal Element:**
- ID: `#modal` (created in Routes.tsx line 20)
- Used by: `Portal` component (`/src/components/Portal.tsx`)
- Renders with `createPortal` from react-dom
- Query selector to find target element

**Portal Component** (`/src/components/Portal.tsx`):
```typescript
- Takes selector prop
- Uses useRef and useEffect to find target DOM element
- Returns createPortal(children, element)
```

**Used by:**
- Modal component (modals/overlays)
- Used in route pages for modal rendering

### 9. KEY COMPONENTS FOR STORY TARGETS

**UI Components** (good story candidates):
- `Button` - Primary interaction component, has clear/round/large/icon variants
- `Modal` - Uses Portal, CSSTransition, body scroll lock, keyboard escape handling
- `Icon` - Icon system with named variants
- `Badge` - Status/label display
- `Input` - Form input with validation
- `Select` - Form select dropdown
- `Breadcrumb` - Navigation aid
- `Logo` - Brand component

**Composite Components:**
- `Header` - Complex: uses Redux, dark mode, router navigation, shopping cart
- `HeaderComponent` - Extracted presentational version (good for isolated stories)
- `ShoppingCart` / `ShoppingCartMenu` - State-heavy, cart items from Redux
- `Footer` - Content-heavy, likely linkage
- `PageTemplate` - Layout wrapper with variant modes

**Page Components** (would need full provider tree):
- `HomePage` - Category browsing
- `CategoryListPage` - List view
- `RestaurantDetailPage` - Detail + menu items
- `CheckoutPage` - Multi-step form, order summary
- `SuccessPage` - Confirmation

**Form Components:**
- `MultiStepForm` - Complex form in checkout
- `Input`, `Select` - Form primitives

### 10. PACKAGE.JSON ANALYSIS

**Key Scripts:**
- `tsc --noEmit` - TypeScript check (no emit)
- `vite build` - Production build
- `storybook dev -p 6006` - Storybook dev server
- `build-storybook` - Storybook static build
- `vitest:storybook` - Run Storybook addon vitest tests

**Critical Dependencies:**
- React 19.0.0, react-dom 19.0.0
- react-router-dom 7.2.0
- @reduxjs/toolkit 2.6.0, react-redux 9.2.0
- styled-components 6.1.15
- react-hook-form 7.54.2
- axios 1.8.1
- use-dark-mode 2.3.1

**Dev Dependencies:**
- Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.17 (alpha build!)
- @storybook/react-vite, addon-vitest, addon-a11y, addon-docs
- @chromatic-com/storybook 5.2.0-next.0
- msw 2.7.3 (installed but not configured)
- vitest 4.0.15, @vitest/browser-playwright

### 11. EXISTING STORYBOOK CONFIGURATION

**`.storybook/main.ts`:**
```typescript
stories: [
  '../src/**/*.mdx',
  '../src/**/*.stories.@(js|jsx|mjs|ts|tsx)',
  './eval-support/*.mdx',
]
addons: [
  '@chromatic-com/storybook',
  '@storybook/addon-vitest',
  '@storybook/addon-a11y',
  '@storybook/addon-docs',
  '@storybook/addon-onboarding',
]
framework: '@storybook/react-vite'
```

**`.storybook/preview.tsx`:**
```typescript
parameters: {
  controls: {
    matchers: {
      color: /(background|color)$/i,
      date: /Date$/i,
    },
  },
  a11y: {
    test: 'todo',
  },
}
```
**NO PROVIDERS CONFIGURED** - Critical gap!

### 12. EXISTING STORIES

**Location:** `/src/stories/`
- `Button.stories.ts` - Example story (generic Button component, not app component)
- `Page.stories.ts` - Example story
- `Header.stories.ts` - Example story
- Supporting files: CSS, assets, demo components

**Status:** Boilerplate/example stories only. No stories for actual app components.

### 13. MSW SETUP

**Status:** **Package installed but NOT configured**
- `msw` 2.7.3 in devDependencies
- package.json has MSW config: `"msw": { "workerDirectory": "public" }`
- **No handlers defined**
- **No service worker setup**
- **No Storybook integration**

**Needed for full Storybook setup:**
- Create `/src/mocks/handlers.ts` with request handlers
- Initialize service worker
- Setup Storybook preview with MSW loader

### 14. DATE-DEPENDENT RENDERING

**Status:** None detected in current codebase
- No `new Date()`, `Date.now()`, `getTime()` calls in main app code
- No date-dependent conditionals
- Timestamps not used in rendering logic

### 15. RUNTIME ENVIRONMENT DEPENDENCIES

**Critical for Story Setup:**

1. **DOM Elements Required:**
   - `#root` - Main app container
   - `#modal` - Portal target (required for Modal components)

2. **Browser APIs:**
   - `window.localStorage` (via use-dark-mode)
   - `window.location` (react-router)
   - `window.scrollTo()` (Routes.tsx line 15)
   - Global event listeners (useKey hook: keydown/keyup)

3. **External Resources:**
   - Google Fonts (Montserrat, Hind) - loaded via @font-face
   - Restaurant API: `https://mealdrop.netlify.app/.netlify/functions/restaurants`

4. **Redux State Initialization:**
   - Cart: `{ visible: false, items: [] }`
   - Order: `{ items: [] }`

5. **Theme Context:**
   - Light theme or dark theme object required
   - Smooth 250ms transitions enabled

6. **Route Context:**
   - BrowserRouter wrapping required
   - useLocation(), useNavigate() available

### CRITICAL ISSUES TO ADDRESS FOR STORYBOOK

1. **Missing Provider Wrapper:** `.storybook/preview.tsx` has no decorator to wrap stories with required providers (Redux, Router, Theme)
2. **Dark Mode localStorage:** `use-dark-mode` reads localStorage - needs mocking in Storybook
3. **Modal Portal:** Stories using Modal need `#modal` DOM element in preview
4. **No MSW Mocking:** API calls will hit real endpoint - needs MSW handler setup
5. **Theme Switching:** Currently controlled by localStorage via useDarkMode hook
6. **Router Usage:** Header, pages need router context - stories need Router wrapper

### COMPONENT DEPENDENCY MAP

**Components using Redux:**
- Header, HeaderComponent (cart state)
- CheckoutPage (cart items)
- Pages using cart/order state

**Components using Router:**
- Header (useNavigate, Link)
- All pages
- Routes component

**Components using Theme:**
- Almost all styled-components
- Modal, Button, form components

**Components using Dark Mode:**
- App.tsx (root)
- Header.tsx (ThemeToggle button)

**Components using Portals:**
- Modal
- ShoppingCartMenu (possibly)

### FILES LOCATION SUMMARY

| Category | Path |
|----------|------|
| Entry Point | `/src/index.tsx` |
| App Shell | `/src/App.tsx`, `/src/Routes.tsx` |
| Redux Store | `/src/app-state/` (store.ts, cart/, order/) |

## Comprehensive React Project Analysis for Storybook Setup

### 1. PROJECT STRUCTURE

**Top-level directories:**
- `/src` - Main application source
- `/.storybook` - Storybook configuration
- `/public` - Static assets
- `/node_modules` - Dependencies
- `/.github`, `.husky` - Git config and hooks
- `/functions` - Netlify functions (external)

**Key root files:**
- `package.json` - Configured with Storybook 10.4.0-alpha.17, MSW 2.7.3, React 19.0.0
- `index.html` - Dual render targets: `#root` and `#modal`
- `tsconfig.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `vitest.config.ts` - Build configuration
- `.storybook/main.ts`, `.storybook/preview.tsx` - Storybook config

### 2. ENTRY POINT - `/src/index.tsx`

```
- Creates React root with StrictMode
- No CSS imports at entry (GlobalStyle handled in App)
- Service worker unregistered (PWA disabled)
```

### 3. APP SHELL - `/src/App.tsx`

**Provider Tree (critical for stories):**
```
<Router>                          (react-router-dom)
  <StoreProvider store={store}>   (Redux)
    <ThemeProvider theme={theme}> (styled-components)
      <GlobalStyle />             (Styled-components global styles)
      <AppRoutes />               (routing component)
    </ThemeProvider>
  </StoreProvider>
</Router>
```

**Dark Mode Implementation:**
- Uses `useDarkMode` hook from `use-dark-mode` library
- **CRITICAL**: Reads from localStorage via the hook
- State: `value: boolean` (false = light, true = dark)
- Applied dynamically at root App level

**CSS/Style Imports:**
- GlobalStyle uses styled-components `createGlobalStyle`
- Imports external CSS:
  - `react-multi-carousel/lib/styles.css`
  - `react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css`
- Google Fonts: Montserrat (400, 500, 700, 900) and Hind (400, 500)
- Smooth 250ms transitions on theme switch

### 4. PROVIDERS & CONTEXTS DEEP DIVE

**Redux Store** (`/src/app-state/`)
- **Slices:**
  - `cart`: `{ visible: boolean, items: CartItem[] }`
    - Actions: toggleVisibilityAction, saveItemAction, clearItemAction, removeItemAction, clearCartAction
  - `order`: `{ items: CartItem[] }`
    - Actions: saveOrderAction, clearOrderAction

- **Selectors (cart):**
  - `selectCartVisibility`
  - `selectCartItems`
  - `selectCartTotal`

- **Custom Hooks:**
  - `useAppDispatch()` - Typed dispatch
  - `useAppSelector()` - Typed selector with RootState

**Dark Mode** (`use-dark-mode` package)
- **KEY ISSUE**: Accesses `localStorage` for persistence
- Hook called in: `App.tsx`, `Header.tsx`
- Needs mocking/provider in Storybook

**Routing** (`react-router-dom` v7.2.0)
- `BrowserRouter` at root
- Routes defined in `Routes.tsx`
- Portal element `#modal` created in Routes component for modals

**Styled Components** (`styled-components` v6.1.15)
- Theme provider with light/dark variants
- Comprehensive theme object with color, spacing, typography, borderRadius, boxShadow

### 5. CSS/STYLE IMPORTS AT ROOT LEVEL

**GlobalStyle** (`/src/styles/GlobalStyle.tsx`):
- Resets via `CSSReset` 
- External dependencies:
  - `react-multi-carousel/lib/styles.css`
  - `react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css`
- Custom fonts via `@font-face` (Montserrat, Hind from Google Fonts)
- Responsive breakpoints via `breakpoints.ts`

**Theme System** (`/src/styles/theme.ts`):
- Light and dark theme variants
- Colors, spacing, typography, borderRadius, boxShadow objects
- Dark mode swaps specific color values

### 6. DATA FETCHING HOOKS

**Location:** `/src/api/hooks.ts`

```
useFetchRestaurants()
  - Fetches all restaurants
  - Status: 'idle' | 'loading' | 'success' | statusCode (error)
  
useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId?: string)
  - Fetches restaurants filtered by category
  - Depends on categoryId
  
useFetchRestaurant(id: string)
  - Fetches single restaurant by ID
```

**API Client** (`/src/api/index.ts`):
- Axios-based
- BASE_URL: `https://mealdrop.netlify.app/.netlify/functions/restaurants`
- **Mock Detection**: Checks `import.meta.env.STORYBOOK`, `NODE_ENV === 'test'`, `__vitest_browser__`
- **Caching**: In-memory Map cache (disabled in mocked environments)
- No MSW setup currently configured (package installed but not initialized)

### 7. BROWSER STATE READS

**localStorage:**
- Used via `use-dark-mode` library for theme persistence
- Stores dark mode preference under key controlled by the library
- **No direct localStorage access** in app code

**sessionStorage:**
- Not used

**Cookies:**
- Not used

### 8. PORTAL USAGE

**Single Portal Element:**
- ID: `#modal` (created in Routes.tsx line 20)

- Query selector to find target element

**Portal Component** (`/src/components/Portal.tsx`):
```typescript
- Takes selector prop
- Uses useRef and useEffect to find target DOM element
- Returns createPortal(children, element)
```

**Used by:**

### 13. MSW SETUP

### 14. DATE-DEPENDENT RENDERING

### 15. RUNTIME ENVIRONMENT DEPENDENCIES

import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'

import { store } from './app-state'
import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'

export default function App() {
  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme

  return (
    <Router>
      <StoreProvider store={store}>
        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
          <GlobalStyle />
          <AppRoutes />
        </ThemeProvider>
      </StoreProvider>
    </Router>
  )
}

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→

    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')

    93→  }, [id, retry])

   100→}

{
  "name": "course-app",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "chromatic": "chromatic --exit-zero-on-changes --only-changed",
    "lint": "eslint --fix .",
    "pre-commit": "lint-staged",
    "prepare": "husky",
    "prettier": "prettier --write .",
    "serve": "vite preview",
    "start": "vite",
    "check": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest",
    "test:ci": "vitest run",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
    "storybook": "storybook dev -p 6006",
    "build-storybook": "storybook build",
    "vitest:storybook": "vitest run --project=storybook"
  },
  "lint-staged": {
    "*.{ts,tsx}": "eslint --fix",
    "*.{html,md}": "prettier --write"
  },
  "browserslist": {
    "production": [
      ">0.2%",
      "not dead",
      "not op_mini all"
    ],
    "development": [
      "last 1 chrome version",
      "last 1 firefox version",
      "last 1 safari version"
    ]
  },
  "resolutions": {
    "@use-it/event-listener@npm:^0.1.2": "patch:@use-it/event-listener@npm%3A0.1.7#~/.yarn/patches/@use-it-event-listener-npm-0.1.7-56ef42a654.patch"
  },
  "dependencies": {

    "styled-components": "^6.1.15",
    "stylis": "^4.3.6",
    "typescript": "^5.7.3",
    "use-dark-mode": "^2.3.1",
    "zod": "^3.24.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@babel/core": "^7.26.9",
    "@chromatic-com/storybook": "^5.2.0-next.0",
    "@eslint/js": "^9.21.0",
    "@storybook/addon-a11y": "10.4.0-alpha.17",
    "@storybook/addon-docs": "10.4.0-alpha.17",
    "@storybook/addon-onboarding": "10.4.0-alpha.17",
    "@storybook/addon-vitest": "10.4.0-alpha.17",
    "@storybook/react-vite": "10.4.0-alpha.17",
    "@testing-library/dom": "^10.4.1",
    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.6.3",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.2.0",
    "@testing-library/user-event": "^14.6.1",
    "@types/node": "^20.17.19",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.10",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.4",
    "@types/react-hooks-helper": "^1.6.6",
    "@types/react-redux": "^7.1.34",
    "@types/react-transition-group": "^4.4.12",
    "@types/stylis": "^4.2.7",
    "@types/testing-library__jest-dom": "^6.0.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^7.18.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^7.18.0",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.4",
    "@vitest/browser-playwright": "4.0.15",
    "@vitest/coverage-v8": "4.0.15",
    "babel-loader": "8.4.1",
    "babel-plugin-istanbul": "^6.1.1",
    "babel-plugin-open-source": "^1.3.4",
    "c8": "^7.14.0",

    "happy-dom": "^17.1.8",

file.content:
import { DefaultTheme } from 'styled-components'

declare module 'styled-components' {
  export interface DefaultTheme {
    name: 'light' | 'dark'
    fonts: {
      family: string
    }
    spacing: typeof spacing
    color: typeof color
    borderRadius: typeof borderRadius
    boxShadow: typeof boxShadow
    typography: typeof typography
  }
}

const baseColors = {
  white: '#FFFFFF ',
  black: '#202020',
  red: {
    base: '#D70808',
    light1: '#E57373',
    light2: '#EF9A9A',
    dark1: '#C62828',
    dark2: '#B71C1C',
  },
  otherBlack: '#2C2C2C ',
  grey: {
    base: '#909090',
    light1: '#A6A6A6',
    light2: '#BCBCBC',
    light3: '#D2D2D2',
    light4: '#E9E9E9',
    light5: '#F5F6F7',
    light6: '#F9F9F9',
    dark1: '#797979',
    dark2: '#636363',
    dark3: '#4D4D4D',
    dark4: '#363636',
    dark5: '#2C2C2C',
    dark6: '#202020',
  },
  green: {
    base: '#E5F8BC',
    light1: '#E8F9C3',
    light2: '#EAF9C9',
    light3: '#EDFAD0',
    light4: '#EFFBD7',
    light5: '#F2FCDE',
    dark1: '#CEDFA9',
    dark2: '#B7C696',
    dark3: '#A0AE84',
    dark4: '#899571',
    dark5: '#737C5E',
  },
  blue: {
    base: '#B1DDE4',
    light1: '#B9E0E7',
    light2: '#C1E4E9',
    light3: '#C8E7EC',
    light4: '#D0EBEF',
    light5: '#D8EEF2',
    dark1: '#9FC7CD',
    dark2: '#8EB1B6',
    dark3: '#7C9BA0',
    dark4: '#6A8589',
    dark5: '#596f72',
  },
}

const spaceUnit = 1

const borderRadius = {
  xs: '4px',
  s: '8px',
  m: '16px',
  l: '24px',
  xl: '32px',
  xxl: '40px',
  round: '50%',
}

const spacing = {
  xxs: `${0.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xs: `${0.5 * spaceUnit}em`,
  s: `${spaceUnit}em`,
  m: `${1.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  l: `${2 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xl: `${3.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xxl: `${5.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
}

const boxShadow = {
  card: '0px 14px 26px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
  inner: 'inset 0 3px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
  outerBorder: `0 0 0 1px ${baseColors.blue.dark2}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.light5}`,
}

const typography = {
  fontSize: {
    body: '1.125rem',
    bodyS: '1rem',
    bodyXS: '0.9rem',
    bodyXXS: '0.72rem',
    heading1: '2.74rem',
    heading2: '2.19rem',
    heading3: '1.75rem',
    heading4: '1.4rem',
  },
  fontWeight: {
    black: '900',
    bold: '700',
    medium: '500',
    regular: '400',
  },
}

const color = {
  accentText: baseColors.black,
  badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.light4,
  badgeText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.base,
  bannerBackground: baseColors.blue.base,
  buttonClear: 'transparent',
  buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.light5,
  buttonPrimary: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.grey.dark5, // recheck
  buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
  buttonSecondaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
  buttonText: baseColors.white,
  cardBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  error: baseColors.red.dark2,
  formBackground: baseColors.white,
  foodItemBackground: baseColors.white,
  footerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  headerBackground: baseColors.white,
  restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.white,
  headerBorder: baseColors.grey.light4,
  inputBackground: baseColors.grey.light5,
  inputHint: baseColors.grey.dark1,
  inputIcon: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  label: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  labelActive: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.light5,
  orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.light5,
  primaryText: baseColors.otherBlack,
  secondaryText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  // This is just used to demo a11y violations, use it in the Review component
  bannerText: baseColors.blue.dark3,
  reviewText: baseColors.blue.dark5,
  screenBackground: baseColors.white,
  sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  sidebarFooter: baseColors.white,

export type ShopItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  price: number
  imageUrl?: string
  description?: string
}

export type FoodMenuItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  description?: string
  price: number
}

export type Restaurant = {
  name: string
  id?: string
  mapsUrl?: string
  rating?: number
  url?: string
  address?: string
  specialty: string
  photoUrl: string
  isClosed?: boolean
  categories?: string[]
  isLoading?: boolean
  isNew?: boolean
  menu: {
    food: FoodMenuItem[]
    dessert: FoodMenuItem[]
    drinks: FoodMenuItem[]
  }
}

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import { CSSTransition } from 'react-transition-group'
     3→
     4→import { Portal } from '../Portal'
     5→import { useKey } from '../../hooks/useKeyboard'
     6→import { Button } from '../Button'
     7→import { useLockBodyScroll } from '../../hooks/useBodyScrollLock'
     8→
     9→import { ModalContent, TopBar, Backdrop } from './Modal.styles'
    10→
    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )

1→import styled from 'styled-components'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import Carousel, { type ArrowProps, type CarouselProps } from 'react-multi-carousel'
     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled, { css } from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→type FontSize = 'body' | 'bodyS' | 'bodyXS' | 'bodyXXS'
     5→type FontWeight = 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
     6→
     7→type StyledBodyProps = {
     8→  $size: string
     9→  $fontWeight: string
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BodyBase = styled.p<StyledBodyProps>(
    13→  ({ $size, $fontWeight, color: textColor, theme: { typography, color } }) => css`
    14→    display: block;
    15→    font-family: 'Hind';
    16→    color: ${textColor || color.primaryText};
    17→    font-weight: ${typography.fontWeight[$fontWeight as FontWeight]};
    18→    font-size: ${typography.fontSize[`body${$size}` as FontSize]};
    19→  `
    20→)
    21→
    22→type AsElement = 'span' | 'p' | 'label' | 'figcaption'
    23→
    24→type ElementProps<T extends AsElement> = T extends 'label'
    25→  ? React.LabelHTMLAttributes<HTMLLabelElement>
    26→  : T extends 'span'
    27→    ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>
    28→    : T extends 'p'
    29→      ? React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>
    30→      : React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>
    31→
    32→type DefaultProps = {
    33→  className?: string
    34→  size?: 'S' | 'XS' | 'XXS'
    35→  fontWeight?: 'regular' | 'medium' | 'bold' | 'black'
    36→  type?: AsElement
    37→  color?: string
    38→  children: React.ReactNode | string
    39→}
    40→
    41→type BodyProps = DefaultProps & ElementProps<AsElement>
    42→
    43→export const Body: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<BodyProps>> = ({
    44→  size = '',
    45→  fontWeight = 'regular',
    46→  type = 'p',
    47→  color,
    48→  children,
    49→  className,
    50→  ...props
    51→}) => (
    52→  <BodyBase
    53→    as={type}
    54→    $size={size}
    55→    $fontWeight={fontWeight}
    56→    color={color}
    57→    className={className}
    58→    {...props}
    59→  >
    60→    {children}
    61→  </BodyBase>
    62→)
    63→

Perfect! Let me create a comprehensive summary document of all the source code. Here's my complete exploration:

## Comprehensive Source Code Analysis

I've thoroughly explored the entire `/src` directory and read all the source files. Here's a complete breakdown:

### **COMPONENT DIRECTORIES**

All components are located in `/src/components/`:
- AnimatedIllustration
- Badge
- Breadcrumb
- Button
- Category
- ErrorBlock
- Footer
- FooterCard
- Header
- Icon
- IconButton
- Logo
- Modal
- PageSection
- Portal
- RestaurantCard
- Review
- Sidebar
- ShoppingCart (with OrderSummary and ShoppingCartItem sub-components)
- ShoppingCartMenu
- Spinner
- TopBanner
- forms (Input, Select)
- typography (Body, Heading)

---

## **KEY COMPONENT FILES WITH PROPS**

### 1. **Button** (`src/components/Button/Button.tsx`)
- **Props**: `clear?`, `round?`, `large?`, `icon?` (IconName), `iconSize?`, `disabled?`, `children`, `onClick?`, plus all HTML button attributes
- **Key Features**: Styled with theme colors, supports icon rendering via Icon component
- Uses useTheme hook for dynamic colors

### 2. **Badge** (`src/components/Badge/Badge.tsx`)
- **Props**: `text: string`, `className?`
- Simple styled component with text-transform: capitalize
- Uses Body typography component

### 3. **Modal** (`src/components/Modal/Modal.tsx`)
- **Props**: `isOpen: boolean`, `onClose: () => void`, `children`
- Uses Portal, CSSTransition for animations
- Uses useKey('escape') hook for close on escape
- Uses useLockBodyScroll hook
- Rendered with backdrop and close button

### 4. **Header** (`src/components/Header/Header.tsx`)
- **Container**: HeaderComponent (presentational) and Header (connected with Redux)
- **HeaderComponent Props**: `isCartVisible?`, `cartItems?`, `totalPrice?`, `logoOnly?`, `sticky?`, `toggleCartVisibility?`, `goToCheckout?`, `saveItem?`
- Uses useNavigate for routing
- Dispatches Redux actions: toggleVisibilityAction, saveItemAction
- Contains ThemeToggle sub-component for dark mode

### 5. **Footer** (`src/components/Footer/Footer.tsx`)
- No props, static component
- Uses Logo, FooterCard sub-components
- Contains hardcoded navigation and social media links
- Renders app store/google play banners

### 6. **RestaurantCard** (`src/components/RestaurantCard/RestaurantCard.tsx`)
- **Props**: `name`, `rating?`, `specialty`, `photoUrl`, `isClosed?`, `categories?`, `isLoading?`, `isNew?`, `onClick?`, `className?`
- Exports RestaurantCardSkeleton for loading state
- Uses Badge component for categories
- Uses Review component for ratings

### 7. **Input** (`src/components/forms/Input.tsx`)
- **Props**: `label?`, `value?`, `onChange?`, `error?`, `id?`, `type?`, plus HTML input attributes
- Shows error messages below input
- Label styling with first-letter uppercase

### 8. **Select** (`src/components/forms/Select.tsx`)
- **Props**: `label?`, `options: any[]`, `value?`, `onChange?`, `id?`, plus HTML select attributes
- Custom styled dropdown with SVG arrow icon
- onChange converts value to Number

### 9. **Icon** (`src/components/Icon/Icon.tsx`)
- **Props**: `name: IconName`, `color?`, `size?` (default '1.5rem')
- IconName types: 'arrow-right', 'arrow-left', 'cross', 'cart', 'minus', 'plus', 'moon', 'sun', 'star'
- Uses SVG sprite-map with xlinkHref

### 10. **Logo** (`src/components/Logo/Logo.tsx`)
- **Props**: `large?`, `logoOnly?`, `animated?`
- SVG-based logo with animated shine effect
- Colors change based on theme (light/dark)
- Renders "MealDrop" text unless logoOnly

### 11. **Breadcrumb** (`src/components/Breadcrumb/Breadcrumb.tsx`)
- **Props**: `items: { label: string, path?: string }[]`
- Link items have paths, last item is plain text
- Separator shows "/"

### 12. **Portal** (`src/components/Portal.tsx`)
- **Props**: `selector: string`, `children`
- Uses createPortal to render in DOM element matching selector
- Queries document.querySelector on mount

### 13. **ShoppingCart Components**
- **OrderSummary** (`src/components/ShoppingCart/OrderSummary/OrderSummary.tsx`): Props: `cartItems: CartItem[]`
  - Calculates total price with useMemo
  - Renders ShoppingCartItem for each item
  
- **ShoppingCartItem** (`src/components/ShoppingCart/ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem.tsx`): Props: `item: CartItem`
  - Displays quantity, name, price

### 14. **Typography Components**
- **Body** (`src/components/typography/Body.tsx`)
  - **Props**: `size?` ('S', 'XS', 'XXS'), `fontWeight?` ('regular', 'medium', 'bold', 'black'), `type?` ('span', 'p', 'label', 'figcaption'), `color?`, `children`, `className?`
  - Renders as configurable element type

- **Heading** (`src/components/typography/Heading.tsx`)
  - **Props**: `level?` (1-5, default 1), `className?`, `children`
  - Renders h1-h5 based on level
  - Uses Montserrat font

### 15. **Supporting Components**
- **Spinner**: Loading animation, no props
- **TopBanner**: Props: `title?`, `photoUrl?`, `onBackClick?`
- **ErrorBlock**: Props: `title`, `image`, `body`, `buttonText`, `onButtonClick`
- **AnimatedIllustration**: Props: `animation` ('NotFound' | 'Error'), lazy loads Lottie animations
- **Review**: Props: `rating?`, displays star rating and text
- **IconButton**: Props: `name: IconName`, `small?`, `onClick?`, other button props
- **ShoppingCartMenu**: Props: `isOpen`, `totalPrice`, `onClose`, `cartItems`, `onGoToCheckoutClick?`, `onItemChange`
- **Category**: Props: `id?`, `title`, `photoUrl`, `round?`
- **PageSection**: Props: `title`, `topButtonLabel?`, `onTopButtonClick?`, `children`
- **FooterCard**: Props: `title`, `links?`, `children`
- **Sidebar**: Props: `isOpen`, `title`, `onClose`, `footer?`, `children`

---

## **PAGE COMPONENTS**

### **HomePage** (`src/pages/HomePage/HomePage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate (default type)
- Components: Banner, RestaurantsSection, AwardWinningSection, CategoriesSection
- Sub-components in `/components/`:
  - **Banner**: CTA with link to /categories
  - **CategoriesSection**: Uses react-multi-carousel, calls useNavigate for /categories/${id}
  - **RestaurantsSection**: Fetches restaurants with useFetchRestaurants hook, carousel display
  - **AwardWinningSection**: Static promo section with sliding background animation

### **CategoryListPage** (`src/pages/CategoryListPage/CategoryListPage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate
- Uses useNavigate, shows TopBanner with back button
- Renders CategoryList component with hardcoded categories from stub

### **CategoryDetailPage** (`src/pages/CategoryDetailPage/CategoryDetailPage.tsx`)
- Uses useParams<'id'> for category ID
- Uses useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(id)
- Renders RestaurantCards in grid, onclick navigates to /restaurants/{id}
- Shows Breadcrumb navigation
- Shows ErrorBlock if no restaurants

### **RestaurantDetailPage** (`src/pages/RestaurantDetailPage/RestaurantDetailPage.tsx`)
- Uses useParams<'id'> for restaurant ID
- Uses useFetchRestaurant(id)
- Uses Redux: selectCartItems, saveItemAction, clearItemAction
- Shows DetailSection with info, MenuSection with food items
- Sub-components:
  - **FoodItemModal**: Modal for adding items, quantity +/-, shows total price
  - **FoodItem**: Card with name, description, price, quantity badge, onClick opens modal
  - **FoodSection**: Grid of FoodItems with title

### **CheckoutPage** (`src/pages/CheckoutPage/CheckoutPage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate type="basic" (no footer)
- Two-step form: Contact Details → Delivery Details
- Renders MultiStepForm and OrderSummary side-by-side
- Sub-components:
  - **MultiStepForm**: State management for form steps
  - **ContactDetails**: Inputs for firstName, lastName, email, phone with validation
  - **DeliveryDetails**: Inputs for address, city, postcode with validation; dispatches saveOrderAction and navigates to /success
  - **StepIndicator**: Progress bar showing step 1 of 2, etc.

### **SuccessPage** (`src/pages/SuccessPage/SuccessPage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate type="basic"
- Displays order confirmation with estimated delivery time
- Uses useAppSelector(selectOrderItems) from Redux
- Shows OrderSummary with order items

### **PageTemplate** (`src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx`)
- **Props**: `type?` ('default' | 'sticky-header' | 'basic'), `children`
- 'default': Header + Container + Footer
- 'sticky-header': Header(sticky) + Container + Footer
- 'basic': HeaderComponent(logoOnly) + Container (no footer)

---

## **HOOKS USED ACROSS CODEBASE**

- `useNavigate()` - React Router
- `useParams()` - React Router
- `useLocation()` - React Router
- `useTheme()` - styled-components
- `useState()` - React state
- `useEffect()` - React lifecycle
- `useCallback()` - React memoization
- `useMemo()` - React memoization
- `useRef()` - React refs
- `useKey()` - Custom hook for keyboard events
- `useLockBodyScroll()` - Custom hook for preventing scroll
- `useAppDispatch()` - Redux
- `useAppSelector()` - Redux
- `useFetchRestaurants()` - Custom API hook
- `useFetchRestaurant(id)` - Custom API hook
- `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(id)` - Custom API hook
- `useDarkMode()` - use-dark-mode package

---

## **REDUX STATE MANAGEMENT**

**Cart State** (`selectCartItems`, `selectCartTotal`, `selectCartVisibility`, `toggleVisibilityAction`, `saveItemAction`, `clearItemAction`, `clearCartAction`)
**Order State** (`selectOrderItems`, `saveOrderAction`)

---

## **ROUTING STRUCTURE**

- `/` - HomePage
- `/categories` - CategoryListPage
- `/categories/:id` - CategoryDetailPage
- `/restaurants/:id` - RestaurantDetailPage
- `/checkout` - CheckoutPage
- `/success` - SuccessPage

---

## **KEY STYLE PATTERNS**

- All components use styled-components with useTheme()
- Responsive design using breakpoints (S, M, L, XL)
- Theme color object accessed throughout
- Box shadows, border radius, spacing from theme
- CSS-in-JS with css`` helper for complex styles
- Media queries for responsive behavior

This is a fully functional food delivery app built with React, Redux, React Router, and styled-components. All components are properly typed with TypeScript and follow consistent patterns throughout.

- Contains hardcoded navigation and social media links
- Renders app store/google play banners

### 6. **RestaurantCard** (`src/components/RestaurantCard/RestaurantCard.tsx`)
- **Props**: `name`, `rating?`, `specialty`, `photoUrl`, `isClosed?`, `categories?`, `isLoading?`, `isNew?`, `onClick?`, `className?`
- Exports RestaurantCardSkeleton for loading state
- Uses Badge component for categories
- Uses Review component for ratings

### 7. **Input** (`src/components/forms/Input.tsx`)
- **Props**: `label?`, `value?`, `onChange?`, `error?`, `id?`, `type?`, plus HTML input attributes
- Shows error messages below input
- Label styling with first-letter uppercase

### 8. **Select** (`src/components/forms/Select.tsx`)
- **Props**: `label?`, `options: any[]`, `value?`, `onChange?`, `id?`, plus HTML select attributes
- Custom styled dropdown with SVG arrow icon
- onChange converts value to Number

### 9. **Icon** (`src/components/Icon/Icon.tsx`)
- **Props**: `name: IconName`, `color?`, `size?` (default '1.5rem')
- IconName types: 'arrow-right', 'arrow-left', 'cross', 'cart', 'minus', 'plus', 'moon', 'sun', 'star'
- Uses SVG sprite-map with xlinkHref

### 10. **Logo** (`src/components/Logo/Logo.tsx`)
- **Props**: `large?`, `logoOnly?`, `animated?`
- SVG-based logo with animated shine effect
- Colors change based on theme (light/dark)
- Renders "MealDrop" text unless logoOnly

### 11. **Breadcrumb** (`src/components/Breadcrumb/Breadcrumb.tsx`)
- **Props**: `items: { label: string, path?: string }[]`
- Link items have paths, last item is plain text
- Separator shows "/"

### 12. **Portal** (`src/components/Portal.tsx`)
- **Props**: `selector: string`, `children`
- Uses createPortal to render in DOM element matching selector
- Queries document.querySelector on mount

### 13. **ShoppingCart Components**
- **OrderSummary** (`src/components/ShoppingCart/OrderSummary/OrderSummary.tsx`): Props: `cartItems: CartItem[]`
  - Calculates total price with useMemo
  - Renders ShoppingCartItem for each item
  
- **ShoppingCartItem** (`src/components/ShoppingCart/ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem.tsx`): Props: `item: CartItem`
  - Displays quantity, name, price

### 14. **Typography Components**
- **Body** (`src/components/typography/Body.tsx`)
  - **Props**: `size?` ('S', 'XS', 'XXS'), `fontWeight?` ('regular', 'medium', 'bold', 'black'), `type?` ('span', 'p', 'label', 'figcaption'), `color?`, `children`, `className?`
  - Renders as configurable element type

- **Heading** (`src/components/typography/Heading.tsx`)
  - **Props**: `level?` (1-5, default 1), `className?`, `children`
  - Renders h1-h5 based on level
  - Uses Montserrat font

### 15. **Supporting Components**
- **Spinner**: Loading animation, no props
- **TopBanner**: Props: `title?`, `photoUrl?`, `onBackClick?`
- **ErrorBlock**: Props: `title`, `image`, `body`, `buttonText`, `onButtonClick`
- **AnimatedIllustration**: Props: `animation` ('NotFound' | 'Error'), lazy loads Lottie animations
- **Review**: Props: `rating?`, displays star rating and text
- **IconButton**: Props: `name: IconName`, `small?`, `onClick?`, other button props
- **ShoppingCartMenu**: Props: `isOpen`, `totalPrice`, `onClose`, `cartItems`, `onGoToCheckoutClick?`, `onItemChange`
- **Category**: Props: `id?`, `title`, `photoUrl`, `round?`
- **PageSection**: Props: `title`, `topButtonLabel?`, `onTopButtonClick?`, `children`
- **FooterCard**: Props: `title`, `links?`, `children`
- **Sidebar**: Props: `isOpen`, `title`, `onClose`, `footer?`, `children`

---

## **PAGE COMPONENTS**

### **HomePage** (`src/pages/HomePage/HomePage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate (default type)
- Components: Banner, RestaurantsSection, AwardWinningSection, CategoriesSection
- Sub-components in `/components/`:
  - **Banner**: CTA with link to /categories
  - **CategoriesSection**: Uses react-multi-carousel, calls useNavigate for /categories/${id}
  - **RestaurantsSection**: Fetches restaurants with useFetchRestaurants hook, carousel display
  - **AwardWinningSection**: Static promo section with sliding background animation

### **CategoryListPage** (`src/pages/CategoryListPage/CategoryListPage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate
- Uses useNavigate, shows TopBanner with back button
- Renders CategoryList component with hardcoded categories from stub

### **CategoryDetailPage** (`src/pages/CategoryDetailPage/CategoryDetailPage.tsx`)
- Uses useParams<'id'> for category ID
- Uses useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(id)
- Renders RestaurantCards in grid, onclick navigates to /restaurants/{id}
- Shows Breadcrumb navigation
- Shows ErrorBlock if no restaurants

### **RestaurantDetailPage** (`src/pages/RestaurantDetailPage/RestaurantDetailPage.tsx`)
- Uses useParams<'id'> for restaurant ID
- Uses useFetchRestaurant(id)
- Uses Redux: selectCartItems, saveItemAction, clearItemAction
- Shows DetailSection with info, MenuSection with food items
- Sub-components:
  - **FoodItemModal**: Modal for adding items, quantity +/-, shows total price
  - **FoodItem**: Card with name, description, price, quantity badge, onClick opens modal
  - **FoodSection**: Grid of FoodItems with title

### **CheckoutPage** (`src/pages/CheckoutPage/CheckoutPage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate type="basic" (no footer)
- Two-step form: Contact Details → Delivery Details
- Renders MultiStepForm and OrderSummary side-by-side
- Sub-components:
  - **MultiStepForm**: State management for form steps
  - **ContactDetails**: Inputs for firstName, lastName, email, phone with validation
  - **DeliveryDetails**: Inputs for address, city, postcode with validation; dispatches saveOrderAction and navigates to /success
  - **StepIndicator**: Progress bar showing step 1 of 2, etc.

### **SuccessPage** (`src/pages/SuccessPage/SuccessPage.tsx`)
- Uses PageTemplate type="basic"
- Displays order confirmation with estimated delivery time
- Uses useAppSelector(selectOrderItems) from Redux
- Shows OrderSummary with order items

### **PageTemplate** (`src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx`)
- **Props**: `type?` ('default' | 'sticky-header' | 'basic'), `children`
- 'default': Header + Container + Footer
- 'sticky-header': Header(sticky) + Container + Footer
- 'basic': HeaderComponent(logoOnly) + Container (no footer)

---

## **HOOKS USED ACROSS CODEBASE**

- `useNavigate()` - React Router
- `useParams()` - React Router
- `useLocation()` - React Router
- `useTheme()` - styled-components
- `useState()` - React state
- `useEffect()` - React lifecycle
- `useCallback()` - React memoization
- `useMemo()` - React memoization
- `useRef()` - React refs
- `useKey()` - Custom hook for keyboard events
- `useLockBodyScroll()` - Custom hook for preventing scroll
- `useAppDispatch()` - Redux
- `useAppSelector()` - Redux
- `useFetchRestaurants()` - Custom API hook
- `useFetchRestaurant(id)` - Custom API hook
- `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(id)` - Custom API hook
- `useDarkMode()` - use-dark-mode package

---

## **REDUX STATE MANAGEMENT**

**Cart State** (`selectCartItems`, `selectCartTotal`, `selectCartVisibility`, `toggleVisibilityAction`, `saveItemAction`, `clearItemAction`, `clearCartAction`)
**Order State** (`selectOrderItems`, `saveOrderAction`)

---

## **ROUTING STRUCTURE**

- `/` - HomePage
- `/categories` - CategoryListPage
- `/categories/:id` - CategoryDetailPage
- `/restaurants/:id` - RestaurantDetailPage
- `/checkout` - CheckoutPage
- `/success` - SuccessPage

---

## **KEY STYLE PATTERNS**

- All components use styled-components with useTheme()
- Responsive design using breakpoints (S, M, L, XL)
- Theme color object accessed throughout
- Box shadows, border radius, spacing from theme
- CSS-in-JS with css`` helper for complex styles
- Media queries for responsive behavior

This is a fully functional food delivery app built with React, Redux, React Router, and styled-components. All components are properly typed with TypeScript and follow consistent patterns throughout.

import styled from 'styled-components'

import { PageTemplate } from '../../templates/PageTemplate'
import { categories } from '../../stub/categories'

import { RestaurantsSection } from './components/RestaurantsSection'
import { CategoriesSection } from './components/CategoriesSection/CategoriesSection'
import { Banner } from './components/Banner'
import { AwardWinningSection } from './components/AwardWinningSection'

const Spacing = styled.div`
  margin-bottom: 4.5rem;
`

export const HomePage = () => (
  <PageTemplate>
    <Banner />
    <Spacing />
    <RestaurantsSection title="Our favorite picks" />
    <Spacing />
    <AwardWinningSection />
    <Spacing />
    <CategoriesSection categories={categories} />
    <Spacing />
  </PageTemplate>
)

file.content:
import styled, { useTheme } from 'styled-components'

const StyledSVG = styled.svg`
  width: 100px;
  height: 100px;
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
`

export const Spinner = () => {
  const { color } = useTheme()
  return (
    <StyledSVG
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      viewBox="0 0 100 100"
      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid"
    >
      <text transform="translate(-50 0)" fill={color.primaryText}>
        Looking for some food...
      </text>
      <animate attributeName="opacity" dur="1s" keyTimes="0;0.4;1" values="0;0;1" />
      <g>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
        </circle>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-15 0)">
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de" transform="rotate(90 50 50)" />
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 1 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;-45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
      </g>
    </StyledSVG>
  )
}

The RestaurantCard Default test fails because `getByText(/burgers/i)` matches multiple elements (both "burgers" and "comfort food" badges). Let me fix that - the issue is that there are two badges and `getByText(/burgers/i)` might fail if multiple elements match. Let me look at the error more carefully.

Actually, looking at the error output, it seems like `getByText(/burgers/i)` is finding multiple matches. Let me use `getAllByText` or be more specific.

Wait, looking at the actual HTML output, the issue might be that the Badge component capitalizes text, so "burgers" becomes "Burgers". Let me check...


The Badge applies text capitalization styling, so "burgers" renders as "Burgers" visually, but the underlying text node should still match the case-insensitive regex. The real problem is likely that `getByText(/burgers/i)` is matching multiple badge elements in the component, not just the one I'm targeting.

Actually, I realize the specialty text reads "Nicest place for burgers" — so the word "burgers" appears both in that description and in the badge itself, which is why the query finds multiple matches. I need to be more specific with my selector to target just the badge.

The HomePage test fails because `getByText(/burger kingdom/i)` is not finding the restaurant name. This could be because:

1. The MSW mock data might not be loading yet within the waitFor timeout
2. The restaurant cards might be showing but not with the expected text

The issue is that the Carousel component from react-multi-carousel is used, and it might need more time or the data might not display properly. Also, checking the error output, "Our favorite picks" was found (the waitFor passed), but "Burger Kingdom" was not found immediately after.

This might be a timing issue - the data needs to load from the MSW handler. 

The waitFor successfully finds "Our favorite picks" but then fails on the restaurant names, which are loaded through the API via the `useFetchRestaurants` hook. I need to add a wait for the restaurant data to appear, and I'm wondering if the MSW service worker setup might be causing issues with axios request interception in the test environment.

content.thinking:
The RestaurantDetailPage story has a nested router issue because the story decorator adds a MemoryRouter but the preview already wraps with MemoryRouter. I need to fix the story to not include the router - instead, I need to override the global decorator.

Actually, the problem is more nuanced. The RestaurantDetailPage uses `useParams` which needs to be inside a Router with a matching Route. The global preview wraps with `<MemoryRouter>`, so the story decorator tries to add another `<MemoryRouter>` inside. 


I'm realizing the simplest solution is to keep the global MemoryRouter and configure the story-level decorator to provide the proper route context without adding a second router wrapper. The core issue is that the global MemoryRouter defaults to "/" but RestaurantDetailPage needs to be at "/restaurants/:id" to match its route parameter. I could modify the preview decorator to read from Storybook parameters and set the correct `initialEntries`, or I could override the decorator at the story level with a properly configured MemoryRouter that has the right starting path and matching routes.

Writing decorator code... I'm realizing the preview configuration approach is getting tangled—I need to step back and think about what's actually story-specific versus what's global setup. For page components that rely on route parameters, the routing context really needs to be part of the story itself rather than trying to abstract it into preview configuration. Let me simplify by having the RestaurantDetailPage story handle its own router setup with the specific route it needs, keeping the preview focused on the global providers.

content.text:
Everything is clean. Here's a summary of what was set up:

**Storybook Configuration:**
- `.storybook/preview.tsx` - Global decorator with MemoryRouter, Redux StoreProvider, ThemeProvider, GlobalStyle, and MSW. Supports `parameters.router` for page stories needing route params.
- `.storybook/main.ts` - Added `staticDirs: ['../public']` to serve `mockServiceWorker.js` and `sprite-map.svg`
- `.storybook/msw-handlers.ts` - MSW handlers mocking the restaurant API (`GET /restaurants`, with `?id=` and `?category=` support)
- `.storybook/preview-body.html` - Portal root `<div id="modal">` for Modal components
- Installed `msw-storybook-addon` dependency

**10 Story Files (27 stories total):**

| File | Stories | Coverage |
|------|---------|----------|
| `Button/Button.stories.tsx` | 7 (Default, Clear, WithIcon, IconOnly, Large, Disabled, **CssCheck**) | Low-level component, CSS validation |
| `Badge/Badge.stories.tsx` | 2 (Default, LongText) | Simple component |
| `RestaurantCard/RestaurantCard.stories.tsx` | 4 (Default, New, Closed, Loading) | Composite component with all states |
| `Header/Header.stories.tsx` | 3 (Default, WithCartItems, LogoOnly) | Redux-connected component |
| `Footer/Footer.stories.tsx` | 1 (Default) | Static layout component |
| `Input.stories.tsx` | 3 (Default, WithError, Filled) | Form component with interaction |
| `Review/Review.stories.tsx` | 3 (Excellent, VeryGood, NoReviews) | Rating display logic |
| `Breadcrumb/Breadcrumb.stories.tsx` | 2 (Default, ThreeLevels) | Router-linked component |
| `HomePage/HomePage.stories.tsx` | 1 (Default) | Full page with MSW data fetch |
| `RestaurantDetailPage/RestaurantDetailPage.stories.tsx` | 1 (Default) | Full page with route params + MSW |

All 35 tests pass (27 new + 8 existing). TypeScript check passes cleanly.

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→

    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)

    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')

    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)

    57→        .catch((error) => {

    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())

    64→  return {

1→import { createSlice, CaseReducer, PayloadAction } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { CartItem } from '../cart'
     4→
     5→export type OrderState = {
     6→  items: CartItem[]
     7→}
     8→
     9→const saveOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState, PayloadAction<CartItem[]>> = (state, action) => {
    10→  state.items = action.payload
    11→}
    12→
    13→const clearOrder: CaseReducer<OrderState> = (state) => {
    14→  state.items = []
    15→}
    16→
    17→const initialState: OrderState = {
    18→  items: [],
    19→}
    20→
    21→const orderSlice = createSlice({
    22→  name: 'order',
    23→  initialState,
    24→  reducers: {
    25→    saveOrderAction: saveOrder,
    26→    clearOrderAction: clearOrder,
    27→  },
    28→})
    29→
    30→// Extract the action creators object and the reducer
    31→export const { actions, reducer } = orderSlice
    32→
    33→// Extract and export each action creator by name
    34→export const { saveOrderAction, clearOrderAction } = actions
    35→
    36→// Export the reducer, either as a default or named export
    37→export default reducer
    38→

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import { CSSTransition } from 'react-transition-group'
     3→
     4→import { Portal } from '../Portal'
     5→import { useKey } from '../../hooks/useKeyboard'
     6→import { Button } from '../Button'
     7→import { useLockBodyScroll } from '../../hooks/useBodyScrollLock'
     8→
     9→import { ModalContent, TopBar, Backdrop } from './Modal.styles'
    10→
    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→
